name: HRC_DL_LAYOUTS_VL
query: SELECT B.LAYOUT_ID, B.LAYOUT_CODE, TL.LAYOUT_NAME, TL.LAYOUT_DESCRIPTION, B.LAYOUT_TYPE, B.LAYOUT_CATEGORY_CODE, B.TOP_BUSINESS_OBJECT_ID, B.STATUS, B.HASH_VALUE, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.OBSOLETE_FLAG OBSOLETE_FLAG, B.MODULE_ID , B.LAYOUT_MODE, B.LEGISLATION_CODE, B.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, B.KEY_PREFERENCE, B.VALIDATION_STATUS, B.LAYOUT_DETAILS, B.LAYOUT_INFO1, B.LAYOUT_INFO2, B.SGUID, B.RUN_MODE, B.RUN_IN_DEBUG_MODE FROM HRC_DL_LAYOUTS_B B, HRC_DL_LAYOUTS_TL TL WHERE B.LAYOUT_ID = TL.LAYOUT_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
